title: MergeTree Internals
description: MergeTree storage engine behaviour: part lifecycle, merge activity, and insert pipeline pressure.

panels.title: Total Parts — ch-customer-1
panels.description: Total number of active data parts across all MergeTree tables. High part counts slow down queries and eventually trigger insert delays.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt32(argMax(Value, TimeUnix)) AS parts FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_TotalPartsOfMergeTreeTables' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

panels.title: Total Parts — ch-customer-2
panels.description: Total number of active data parts across all MergeTree tables.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt32(argMax(Value, TimeUnix)) AS parts FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_TotalPartsOfMergeTreeTables' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

panels.title: Active Merges
panels.description: Number of merge processes running right now in the background pool. ClickHouse merges small parts into larger ones continuously.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt32(sum(latest)) AS active_merges FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS latest FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_BackgroundMergesAndMutationsMerge' AND ServiceName IN ('ch-customer-1', 'ch-customer-2') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY ServiceName)

panels.title: Delayed Inserts
panels.description: INSERTs being throttled because the part count is too high. Should always be 0. Non-zero means ClickHouse is struggling to merge fast enough.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt32(sum(latest)) AS delayed FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS latest FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_DelayedInserts' AND ServiceName IN ('ch-customer-1', 'ch-customer-2') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY ServiceName)

panels.title: Part Lifecycle
panels.description: Each INSERT creates one or more new parts on disk. ClickHouse merges them in the background. Watching part count rise and fall reveals this cycle.

panels.title: Total Active Parts Over Time
panels.description: Watch this rise after bursts of inserts and fall as merges complete. A permanently rising trend means merges cannot keep up.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_TotalPartsOfMergeTreeTables' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_TotalPartsOfMergeTreeTables' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Merge Activity
panels.description: Merges are the core background process of MergeTree. ClickHouse reads multiple small parts, sorts and merges them, writes one larger part, then removes the originals.

panels.title: Active Merges Over Time
panels.description: Concurrent merges running in the background merge pool. The pool size is controlled by background_pool_size (default 16).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_BackgroundMergesAndMutationsMerge' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_BackgroundMergesAndMutationsMerge' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Merges Completed per Minute
panels.description: Rate of merge operations finishing. Each completed merge reduces the part count. Low merge rate with high part count = a problem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_Merge' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_Merge' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Rows Merged per Minute
panels.description: Volume of rows being processed by merges. Large spikes indicate heavy merge work — expected after bulk inserts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergedRows' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergedRows' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Bytes Merged per Minute (uncompressed)
panels.description: Uncompressed bytes read and rewritten during merges. This drives I/O load. MergeTree always merges in uncompressed form, then recompresses the output part.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergedUncompressedBytes' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergedUncompressedBytes' AND ServiceName = 'ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Average Merge Duration (ms)
panels.description: MergeTotalMilliseconds / Merge count = average time per merge. Long merges mean large parts being merged — normal, but watch for sustained high values.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t1.time, t1.ms / nullIf(t2.cnt, 0) AS customer_1 FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS ms FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergeTotalMilliseconds' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS cnt FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_Merge' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

SELECT t1.time, t1.ms / nullIf(t2.cnt, 0) AS customer_2 FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS ms FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_MergeTotalMilliseconds' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS cnt FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_Merge' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

panels.title: Insert Pipeline
panels.description: Each INSERT in MergeTree creates a new part immediately. Small, frequent inserts = many tiny parts = merge pressure. Batch inserts = fewer parts = healthier.

panels.title: Insert Queries per Minute
panels.description: Number of INSERT statements per minute. Many small inserts stress the merge system. Ideal: batch writes so each insert covers 10k–100k rows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertQuery' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertQuery' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Rows Inserted per Minute
panels.description: Total rows written per minute. Cross-reference with Insert Queries: same rows across fewer queries = healthier batching.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertedRows' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertedRows' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Delayed Inserts Over Time
panels.description: ClickHouse delays (throttles) INSERTs when a table has too many parts (default threshold: 150). This is a self-protection mechanism — inserts will slow down but not fail. Sustained delays = merge throughput is insufficient.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_DelayedInserts' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_DelayedInserts' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Rejected Inserts per Minute
panels.description: INSERTs rejected outright because the part count exceeded the hard limit (default: 300). This causes errors for the client. Should always be 0.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_1 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_RejectedInserts' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-1' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS customer_2 FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_RejectedInserts' AND ServiceName='ch-customer-2' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
